verifyDialog.idleHint: Select a key, then run the simulation. Provide a model id if the key cannot be used to infer one.
verifyDialog.profileIdleHint: Choose a model, then run the simulation. You can still enter a model id manually if the fetched list misses it.
verifyDialog.requiresModelId: Provide a model id before running this check.

summaries.endpointNotFound: Endpoint not found (404): this API may not be supported
summaries.noRuntimeKeySecret: No API key is available for the selected key.
summaries.noToolCallDetected: No tool call detected (tool calling may not be supported)
summaries.unauthorized: Unauthorized (401): invalid key or missing auth

verifyDialog.title: CLI Support Simulation
verifyDialog.warning: A detected pass is likely real; a fail may still work in some clients. Treat the result as guidance and verify with the actual CLI when possible.
